title: Map location view.

posts.author: l27 (John Long)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I would like to have a map view on one side or bottom and a list view on the other and when I click a location on the map it takes me to the list item. The list item contains multiple subs.

This exact functionality already exists in Monday! It’s locked away in the map settings, Display Type, split mode. It puts the map on the top and a list on the bottom. When you click a location on the map it highlights the item in the list! I want exactly this but on the main view.
